name: Toll House Crumbcake
recipeInstructions: For the topping, mix margarine, flour, and brown sugar with a fork until crumbly. Stir in 1/2 cup of chocolate chips and nuts. Gradually add the flour mixture alternately with sour cream to the mixture. Fold in the remaining 1/2 cup of chocolate chips. Spread into a greased 13" x 9" pan. Sprinkle topping evenly and bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes.
